title: Oracle security advisory (AV26-526)
description: On May 28, 2026, Oracle published a security advisory to address critical vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Oracle Communications Unified Assurance - versions 6.1.1 to 7.0.0
Oracle Hospitality OPERA 5 Property Services - versions 5.6.19.24, 5.6.22, 5.6.25.19, 5.6.27.6 and 5.6.28
Oracle REST Data Services - versions 24.2.0 to 26.1.0
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
